2605.31090.title: On Revisiting Entropy for Identifying Mislabeled Images
2605.31090.paper_summary: Mislabeled samples in training datasets severely degrade the performance of deep networks, as overparameterized models tend to memorize erroneous labels. We address this challenge by proposing a novel approach for mislabeled data detection that leverages training dynamics. Our method is grounded in the key observation that correctly labeled samples exhibit consistent entropy decrease during training, while mislabeled samples maintain relatively high entropy throughout the training process. Building on this insight, we introduce a signed entropy integral (SEI) statistic that captures both the magnitude and temporal trend of prediction entropy across training epochs. SEI is broadly applicable to classification networks and demonstrates particular effectiveness when integrated with contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP) architectures. Through extensive experiments on four medical imaging datasets -- a domain particularly susceptible to labeling errors due to diagnostic complexity -- spanning diverse modalities and pathologies, we demonstrate that SEI achieves state-of-the-art performance in mislabeled data identification, outperforming existing methods while maintaining computational efficiency and implementation simplicity. Our code is available at https://github.com/MedAITech/SEI.
2605.31090.paper_summary_zh: 標記錯誤的樣本在訓練數據集中會嚴重降低深度網絡的性能，因為過參數化模型傾向於記住錯誤的標籤。<lb/>我們通過提出一種利用訓練動態的新方法來解決這一挑戰，以檢測標記錯誤的數據。<lb/>我們的方法基於一個關鍵觀察：正確標記的樣本在訓練過程中表現出一致的熵減少，而標記錯誤的樣本在整個訓練過程中保持相對較高的熵。<lb/>基於這一見解，我們引入了一種簽名熵積分（SEI）統計量，該統計量捕捉了預測熵在訓練世代中的幅度和時間趨勢。<lb/>SEI廣泛適用於分類網絡，並在與對比語言-圖像預訓練（CLIP）架構集成時顯示出特別的有效性。<lb/>通過在四個醫學影像數據集上進行廣泛實驗——這是一個由於診斷複雜性而特別容易出現標記錯誤的領域——涵蓋多種模態和病理，我們證明SEI在標記錯誤數據識別方面達到了最先進的性能，超越了現有方法，同時保持計算效率和實施簡便性。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/MedAITech/SEI 獲得。
2605.31090.author: Chunlei Li et.al.
2605.31090.authors: Chunlei Li, Zixuan Zheng, Yilei Shi, Guanglu Dong, Pengfei Li, Jingliang Hu, Xiao Xiang Zhu, Lichao Mou
